confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of all task phases and loop placement relative to marking line. Excellent camera angle throughout procedure allows accurate assessment of technique and positioning.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter precision of loop placement due to video resolution limitations
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth, efficient execution and precise loop placement at the marked line. Total time of 11 seconds is well within expert benchmark range.
strengths: Precise loop placement at marked line
Secure loop cinching without appendage damage
improvement_suggestions: Performance is already at expert level with minimal room for improvement
Could potentially reduce loop deployment time by 1-2 seconds
